# Eval Run Analysis Packet Template

Use this template when producing an eval-run analysis report or downstream handoff.

```yaml
workflow_mode:
current_stage: eval-run-analysis-desk
capability_id:
user_goal:
release_or_change_context:
source_facts:
run_ids:
run_metadata:
baseline_run:
dataset_slices:
rubric:
grader_versions:
thresholds:
threshold_status:
regression_deltas:
failure_examples:
failure_clusters:
grader_reliability:
blockers:
warnings:
accepted_risks:
release_gate_status:
rerun_requirements:
recommended_fixes:
hard_halts:
soft_gaps:
ready_to_continue:
downstream_handoff_targets:
```
